indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light and views, enhancing the casual atmosphere.

indicators.name: Spacious layout
indicators.rationale: Spacious layout provides ample room for multiple people to move around comfortably.

indicators.name: Modern furniture
indicators.rationale: Modern furniture adds a contemporary touch, making the space feel open and inviting.

reasoning_summary: The large windows, spacious layout, and modern furniture all contribute to a comfortable and inviting environment suitable for casual conversations and hangouts.
